qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: A process executes the following segment of code : for(i = 1; i <= n; i++) fork (); The number of new processes created is A. B. C. D.

qids.prose: Which one of the following is true for a CPU having a single interrupt request line and a single interrupt grant line? A. Neither vectored interrupt nor multiple interrupting devices are possible
